spec_match.rationale: Superb demonstrate of the sibling combinator (audio:playing + .track-row) and mute state triggers.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive. Includes five loaded silent audio sources, comprehensive playback controls (prev, play, next, mute), visual album art animations, and live active CSS labels.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect. Demonstrates how sibling style matches replace class toggling on active items.

edge_cases.rationale: Excellent integration of a JS-based class toggle fallback for older browsers.

references.rationale: Includes a direct ChromeStatus entry reference link.

design_system.rationale: Fits right into standard monochrome card grids using elegant CSS animation pulses.

summary: The playlist-ui is a masterclass in sibling selectors, driving complex item transitions and pulses entirely via CSS.
